strengths: TypeScript and Node.js are central to both his current role at re:cinq and Optilyz, with React explicitly used at Optilyz — direct primary stack coverage
Currently building MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq, directly satisfying the AI agent development requirement
AWS CDK at Optilyz, Kubernetes deployment for GISCollective, and Docker/CI setup at Altom demonstrate solid cloud and containerization depth
concerns: Nest.js is never mentioned across 15+ years of roles, representing a gap in the primary backend framework
Specific testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) are not cited; TDD practice is evident from RIDE Capital and Fluent-Asserts library but tooling alignment is unverified
Kotlin is entirely absent; Java appears only in non-web contexts (robotic arms, mobile device orchestration), leaving the secondary backend stack partially unmet
response.justification: Bogdan has 15+ years of progressive fullstack experience with strong alignment to the primary stack: TypeScript and Node.js anchor both his current re:cinq role and Optilyz, React was used at Optilyz, and AWS CDK plus Kubernetes cover the cloud and containerization requirements. The AI agent development requirement is met concretely — he currently builds MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks, which is a direct and current match. MongoDB is documented at Optilyz, SQL and MySQL appear in the skills section, and Docker and CI/CD pipelines are established from Altom. The primary gap is Nest.js, which is never mentioned; Kotlin is also absent, with Java appearing only in embedded/tooling contexts. Testing culture is strong (TDD at RIDE, a TDD library authored in D, Code Kata facilitation) even though Vitest, Jest, and Playwright are not explicitly named. These gaps are surface area for an engineer of this caliber, not fundamental mismatches. Score is derived from confirmed stack overlap and the rare direct AI agent experience, discounted for the Nest.js and Kotlin absences.
